EmailTemplate.description: Attempt to contact customer regarding lack of payment has failed and the policy has been cancelled before inception.
EmailTemplate.name: Live Policy – No Payment (Cancel from Inception) (2)
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Policy Has Been Cancelled
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We have been attempting to contact you regarding the outstanding payment for your business insurance. Unfortunately, as we have not heard from you, we regretfully inform you that your insurance policy has been cancelled from inception.
Please be advised that your insurance is now considered null and void and you have no rights to any cover. Claims made on this policy will not be honoured.
If you have any questions then please do not hesitate to get in touch. We hope you will consider Kingsbridge for your business insurance in the future.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
